step_description: Sleeping and inactive sessions ordered by inactive duration
narrative_hint: There are several sleeping connections from AppServer-01. Most notably, SPID 73 has been sleeping for 14,400 seconds (4 hours) and has 1 open transaction, while holding 200MB of tempdb space. This strongly suggests a leaked connection from the application layer that started a transaction but failed to commit/roll back or close the connection. Claude should identify SPID 73 as the culprit and check for blocking next to see if it is obstructing active workload.
